categories.name: Payments & Withdrawals
categories.definition: Deposits, withdrawals, balances, payment timing, duplicate charges, transaction histories and payment-method status where fraud is not primary.

categories.name: KYC & Verification
categories.definition: Identity verification, document requirements, verification status, identity-data corrections and secure recovery where identity validation is central.

categories.name: Bonuses & Promotions
categories.definition: Bonuses, free spins, cashback, loyalty points, wagering requirements and promotional eligibility where a formal complaint is not primary.

categories.name: Technical & Game Issues
categories.definition: Application failures, game interruptions, round-state disputes and technical defects affecting gameplay.

categories.name: Responsible Gambling
categories.definition: Self-exclusion, loss of control, harm-linked closure, safer-gambling controls, cool-offs, limits and return-to-play risk.

categories.name: Fraud & Compliance
categories.definition: Underage gambling, unauthorized account or payment use, account takeover, third-party payment ownership, suspicious documents and material security/compliance allegations.

categories.name: Complaints & Regulatory
categories.definition: Explicit formal complaints, unresolved escalations, regulator/ADR/legal escalation and requests about complaint handling or status.

categories.name: General
categories.definition: Account support, informational requests, preferences, compliments and other matters not more specifically covered.

priorities.critical: Immediate protective/security handling: explicit self-exclusion, severe loss of control, credible self-harm, underage, sensitive authentication data, or active account/payment compromise.
priorities.high: Prompt specialist/escalated handling due to significant financial, complaint, security, protective-control or compliance risk.
priorities.medium: Account-specific investigation or controlled review without immediate critical harm/exposure.
priorities.low: Routine static information with no account-specific decision, complaint escalation or high-risk signal.

routes.auto_respond: Only a low-risk approved static template; the prototype does not send it.
routes.human: Ordinary account-specific support or investigation by a human agent.
routes.specialist: Mandatory specialist handling for high/critical risk or regulated/specialized work.

primary_category_precedence: Complaints & Regulatory explicit formal or unresolved escalation
